gaming.label: Gaming
gaming.description: 720p video-only profile tuned for stable frame pacing.
gaming.notes: Use when OBS is live and you want predictable overhead.

recording.label: Recording
recording.description: 1080p profile tuned for capture quality with video-only defaults.
recording.notes: Use when image quality matters more than minimum latency.

recording-audio.label: Recording + Audio
recording-audio.description: 1080p profile with audio enabled for systems that have snd_aloop available.
recording-audio.notes: Use when you want phone audio and the ALSA loopback device is available.

low-latency.label: Low Latency
low-latency.description: 960x720 video-only profile with the shortest scan timeout.
low-latency.notes: Use when the network is noisy and you want fast recovery.
